product: Google Cloud long-running operations (exercised against Document AI v1)
interface: google.longrunning Operations REST mapping v1 with the google.rpc error model

operation_message.name: server-assigned, e.g. projects/{p}/locations/{l}/operations/{id}
operation_message.metadata: google.protobuf.Any JSON: an object carrying an @type field plus service-specific progress (e.g. BatchProcessMetadata state)
operation_message.done: boolean; absent or false means still in progress — neither error nor response is set then
operation_message.union_rule: when done is true, EXACTLY ONE of error or response is set; done:true with neither violates the contract and must be rejected
operation_message.error: google.rpc.Status: {code: gRPC numeric code, message, details: [Any with @type]}
operation_message.response: google.protobuf.Any JSON with @type naming the service's response message

endpoints.get: GET {service-base}/v1/{name} — the operation name is a multi-segment path spliced in verbatim ({name=**/operations/*}); clients poll this method
endpoints.cancel: POST {service-base}/v1/{name}:cancel with an EMPTY request body; empty JSON object response on success
endpoints.cancel_semantics: best-effort; the operation is NOT deleted — it completes with Operation.error carrying google.rpc.Status.code 1 (Code.CANCELLED); verify via GetOperation; servers that don't support cancel return UNIMPLEMENTED

http_error_envelope.shape: {error: {code: <HTTP status>, message, status: <google.rpc.Code enum NAME>, details: [...]}}
http_error_envelope.error_info: details entries carry @type; google.rpc.ErrorInfo has reason (SCREAMING_SNAKE), domain (service host), metadata (string map)
http_error_envelope.code_mappings: CANCELLED=1↔HTTP 499, INVALID_ARGUMENT=3↔400, NOT_FOUND=5↔404, UNIMPLEMENTED=12↔501, UNAVAILABLE=14↔503, DEADLINE_EXCEEDED=4↔504

retry_rules.retryable: UNAVAILABLE only, per Google's automatic-retry guidance, with bounded attempts and injected backoff
retry_rules.not_retryable: CANCELLED, DEADLINE_EXCEEDED, INVALID_ARGUMENT, NOT_FOUND, PERMISSION_DENIED, UNIMPLEMENTED, and the other terminal codes must fail immediately without a retry or a backoff pause

test_fixture_notes.token: dummy-docai-token-5150 (dummy; must never appear in error text)
